justifications.clarity: Prose is consistently lucid, well-paced, and authoritative throughout the full ~2,720-line chapter. Financial motivations are woven into every conceptual step. Notation is defined before use and remains consistent across all sections. Section transitions are explicitly motivated with forward/backward pointers. Context-setting vignettes open each practitioner section effectively. Cross-chapter references (def:word-embedding, sec:classical-tfidf, sec:embeddings) are intentional intra-book references to ch01 that resolve correctly in compilation. No broken or ambiguous references remain. The roadmap prose (lines 2707–2715) now correctly references Ch. 3–5, 6–7, 8–9, 10–13, 14, 15, eliminating the previously confusing mismatch.
justifications.rigor: All key propositions are formally stated and proved: vanishing-gradient bound (Proposition on RNNs), attention weights forming a probability distribution, sqrt(d_k) variance normalisation, sinusoidal PE relative-position linearity. The four previously comment-placeholder citations (EU AI Act §2492, SEC 2023 AI guidance §2505, GDPR §2525, Llama 3 GPU memory §1150) are now live \citep{} commands, removing the last class of unsupported claims in regulatory and empirical assertions. SBERT mean-pool denominator correctly divides by sum(m_j). LSTM constant-error carousel is appropriately qualified. Forward-versus-reverse KL remark in distillation is technically precise. Minor: entropy H(tau) strictly increasing is asserted without proof; explosive gradient lower bound is argued informally. Both remain acceptable at this level.
justifications.completeness: All seven stated learning objectives are fully covered: (1) RNN vanishing-gradient derivation and LSTM resolution in the sequential models section; (2) scaled dot-product attention formula with sqrt(d_k) proof and multi-head attention; (3) temperature, top-p, beam search, and financial strategy selection table; (4) constrained decoding and JSON extraction with working Python listing; (5) RAG pipeline with code; (6) knowledge distillation, LoRA, and quantisation; (7) five or more hallucination-mitigation techniques. Exercise set includes 6 exercises spanning [B] (attention numerical, sampling strategy), [I] (illustration, LoRA budget, SBERT pipeline), and [A] (RAG hallucination audit). All required difficulty levels present. Exercise count is lean for a 9-section chapter but meets the project minimum. No placeholder content remains.
justifications.pedagogy: Learning objectives are stated upfront and map cleanly to labelled sections and exercises. The deepdive/context/remark/example/definition/proposition/proof environment structure is used correctly and consistently: deepdive for mathematical derivations, context for practitioner-oriented material. Financial examples are integrated throughout (merger valuation from earnings call, covenant extraction, FinBERT benchmarks, BloombergGPT). Chapter summary and roadmap table (now with corrected chapter numbers 3–15) effectively consolidate the material. New exercises cover key sub-topics mapped directly to LOs, with increasing difficulty across [B]/[I]/[A] tags. The EBNF grammar listing and RAG code listing are well-integrated pedagogical demonstrations.
justifications.style: All five tables are proper table floats with \caption and \label. Roadmap table rows now correctly show chapters 3–15 (previously 2–14). Numbered subsections used consistently throughout. \citet/\citep used correctly in all locations. The four formerly comment-placeholder citations for EU AI Act, GDPR, SEC 2023 AI guidance, and Llama 3 GPU memory are now live \citep{} commands, making the citation style fully consistent. Inter-chapter references (sec:embeddings, sec:classical-tfidf) now qualified with 'Chapter~1' for standalone-reader clarity. KD gradient-magnitude rescaling cites \citep{hinton2015distilling}. Math-mode e.g. removed. Claude version numbers removed for longevity. outlines listing carries version comment. No \paragraph{} or inline \textbf{} paragraph-label violations. Overall style is professional and consistent.
